creator: nikolas.britton@gmail.com
text:
After installing FreeBSD 10 beta 2 on a ZFS encrypted root volume the system asks for the passphrase at boot up at the wrong time, it continues with enumeration and the line asking for the passphrase scrolls off the screen. It appears as though the system hung during device enumeration, but in fact the system is simply waiting for a passphrase to be entered.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 10 beta2 with a root zfs encrypted disk.
